2604.07320.title: Evaluating In-Context Translation with Synchronous Context-Free Grammar Transduction
2604.07320.paper_summary: Low-resource languages pose a challenge for machine translation with large language models (LLMs), which require large amounts of training data. One potential way to circumvent this data dependence is to rely on LLMs' ability to use in-context descriptions of languages, like textbooks and dictionaries. To do so, LLMs must be able to infer the link between the languages' grammatical descriptions and the sentences in question. Here we isolate this skill using a formal analogue of the task: string transduction based on a formal grammar provided in-context. We construct synchronous context-free grammars which define pairs of formal languages designed to model particular aspects of natural language grammar, morphology, and written representation. Using these grammars, we measure how well LLMs can translate sentences from one formal language into another when given both the grammar and the source-language sentence. We vary the size of the grammar, the lengths of the sentences, the syntactic and morphological properties of the languages, and their written script. We note three key findings. First, LLMs' translation accuracy decreases markedly as a function of grammar size and sentence length. Second, differences in morphology and written representation between the source and target languages can strongly diminish model performance. Third, we examine the types of errors committed by models and find they are most prone to recall the wrong words from the target language vocabulary, hallucinate new words, or leave source-language words untranslated.
2604.07320.paper_summary_zh: 低資源語言對於大型語言模型（LLMs）的機器翻譯構成挑戰，因為這些模型需要大量的訓練數據。<lb/>一種潛在的解決方法是依賴LLMs利用語言的上下文描述，例如教科書和字典。<lb/>為了做到這一點，LLMs必須能夠推斷語言的語法描述與相關句子之間的聯繫。<lb/>在這裡，我們使用任務的形式類比來隔離這項技能：基於上下文提供的形式語法的字符串轉換。<lb/>我們構建了同步無上下文文法，定義了一對對的形式語言，旨在模擬自然語言語法、形態學和書寫表現的特定方面。<lb/>使用這些文法，我們測量LLMs在給定文法和源語言句子的情況下，將一種形式語言的句子翻譯成另一種形式語言的能力。<lb/>我們變更文法的大小、句子的長度、語言的句法和形態特徵以及它們的書寫系統。<lb/>我們注意到三個關鍵發現。<lb/>首先，LLMs的翻譯準確性明顯隨著文法大小和句子長度的變化而下降。<lb/>其次，源語言和目標語言之間的形態學和書寫表現的差異會大幅降低模型的性能。<lb/>第三，我們檢查模型所犯的錯誤類型，發現它們最容易從目標語言詞彙中回憶錯誤的單詞、幻想新單詞，或不翻譯源語言單詞。
2604.07320.author: Jackson Petty et.al.
2604.07320.authors: Jackson Petty, Jaulie Goe, Tal Linzen
